queue.title: Implement profile YAML parser and validator
Add LLMClient protocol and stub/Claude backends
queue.description: Add LLMClient protocol to core/protocols.py. Implement StubLLMClient (deterministic mock) and ClaudeLLMClient (Anthropic API). Stub routes prompts by keyword to return entities/relationships/findings/evaluation JSON.

queue.title: Wire LLM into DAG node handlers (NodeExecutor)
queue.description: Add NodeExecutor class to skill/dag.py with handlers for extraction, reasoning, synthesis, and filter node types. Each handler builds an LLM prompt from node config + upstream outputs, calls LLMClient.complete(), parses JSON response. DAGExecutor accepts optional NodeExecutor and profile for LLM-backed execution, falls back to stub dicts without them.

queue.title: Wire LLM into Tier 2 evaluation (evaluator + scorer + resolver)
queue.description: Add Evaluator._run_template() using real NodeExecutor+LLM. Add Evaluator.evaluate_with_llm() for full LLM-backed evaluation. Add Scorer.score_with_llm_judge() for LLM-as-judge comparative scoring. Add ConflictResolver.evaluate_tier2() that wires evaluator+scorer for Tier 2 conflicts.

queue.title: Implement project manifest parser (ManifestParser + ManifestLocator)
queue.description: Parse and validate project.yaml with name, skills, routes (directory/keyword/file_pattern conditions), default_skill, fusion_enabled. ManifestLocator walks up directory tree to find .contextledger/project.yaml. Supports to_yaml() for roundtrip serialization.

queue.title: Implement skill router (SkillRouter)
queue.description: Route queries to skills via directory match (most specific wins), file pattern match, keyword match (most keywords wins), default skill, or first declared skill. Fallback chain: directory > file_pattern > keyword > default > first. route_all() returns all skills for cross-skill queries.

queue.title: Implement context fusion (ContextFuser)
queue.description: Deduplicate results from multiple skills by content (first 200 chars as key). Annotate each result with source_skills list and cross_skill boolean. Sort active skill results first. Returns MultiSkillQueryResult with fused_results and results_by_skill.

queue.title: Implement project manager (ProjectManager)
queue.description: Top-level orchestrator: loads manifest, routes via SkillRouter, fuses via ContextFuser. query_all() queries every skill and fuses results. query_routed() queries only the auto-selected skill. Explicit --profile overrides all routing. Gracefully handles missing memory system.

queue.title: Integration test: multi-skill project mode
queue.description: End-to-end test with GenOpt-style project structure. Verifies directory routing to correct skill, keyword routing at project root, cross-skill query across all skills, content deduplication with attribution, explicit profile override, and default skill fallback.

queue.title: Implement CLI project subcommands
queue.description: Add ctx project group with init, status, query, route, add-skill, remove-skill subcommands. init creates .contextledger/project.yaml with optional auto-generated routes. query supports --all and --profile flags. route is a dry-run debug tool.

queue.title: Update MCP server with project tools
queue.description: Add ctx_project_query(query, mode, current_dir, file_path, profile, limit) and ctx_project_status() tools. project_query supports routed and all modes. project_status returns manifest info.

queue.title: Add Phase 2 data types
queue.description: Add RoutingStrategy, SkillRoute, ProjectManifest, and MultiSkillQueryResult to core/types.py. These support multi-skill project routing, manifest configuration, and cross-skill query results.

queue.title: README corrections (6 targeted fixes)
queue.description: Apply 6 factual corrections to README.md from contextledger-remaining-work.md Part 3. Fix 1: Replace domain-specific opening problem statement with generic workflow fork/merge description and domain-agnostic use cases. Fix 2: Replace vague 'semantic conflict resolution' claim with precise tier-based description. Fix 3: Replace 'works for any workflow' with concrete profile-based description. Fix 4: Expand 'semantic understanding on Git' in Key Design Decisions with 3 concrete mechanisms (section-aware diffing, DAG dependency analysis, Tier 2 evaluation). Fix 5: Split conflict resolution status into separate tier 1/2/3 rows with accurate readiness indicators. Fix 6: Update GitHub repo description (manual on GitHub.com, not code).

queue.title: README multi-skill project section
queue.description: Add 'Mode 3: Multi-Skill Projects' section to README.md after 'Mode 2: Second Brain', documenting Phase 2 functionality. Include: project manifest setup (ctx project init), project.yaml example with skills/routes/fusion config, query commands (auto-routed, --all, --profile override, route dry-run, project status), guidance on when to use multi-skill vs single-skill.

queue.title: Update README opening per positioning doc
queue.description: Replace current README opening (down to '## The Problem') with tightened version from contextledger-positioning.md Part 1. Lead with problem statement, pip install, then Skill Versioning / Second Brain / Multi-Skill Projects sections with concrete CLI examples. Add 'What this is not' footer.

queue.title: Python function extractor (Phase 3 Feature 1A)
queue.description: Build PythonExtractor in skill/extractor.py. Reads a Python file via ast.parse, identifies candidate functions (names containing extract/parse/analyse/synthesise/filter/clean/validate, or returning dicts with findings/entities/results keys). Maps candidates to DAG node types via name inference. Infers inter-function dependencies from call graph. Generates a valid profile.yaml stub with extraction entities, synthesis DAG nodes, and REVIEW comments for user to fill in. No LLM dependency — pure AST analysis.

queue.title: Claude Code skill importer (Phase 3 Feature 1B)
queue.description: Build ClaudeSkillImporter in skill/extractor.py. Reads an existing .claude/skills/SKILL.md file, uses LLMClient to infer domain/entities/sources from content, generates a ContextLedger profile.yaml that wraps the SKILL.md as a reference document in refs/. Requires LLMClient (protocol exists, ClaudeLLMClient and StubLLMClient already implemented).

queue.title: Example-based skill creator (Phase 3 Feature 1C)
queue.description: Build ExampleBasedCreator in skill/extractor.py. User provides 3-5 JSON examples of {session_excerpt, finding} pairs. Uses LLMClient with few-shot prompting to infer extraction rules from examples. Generates extraction.rules section of profile.yaml. Requires minimum 3 examples, raises on fewer. Requires LLMClient.

queue.title: Extractor CLI commands
queue.description: Add CLI commands to cli/main.py for the three extractors: ctx extract --from <file> --output <path> (Python extractor), ctx import --from <skill_md> --output <path> (Claude skill importer), extend ctx new with --from-examples <json_file> option (example-based creator). All commands write to stdout or --output file.

queue.title: LangChain callback handler (Phase 3 Feature 5)
queue.description: Build ContextLedgerCallbackHandler in integrations/langchain_handler.py. Extends langchain.callbacks.base.BaseCallbackHandler. On on_llm_start: captures prompt as user message. On on_llm_end: captures response as assistant message. On on_chain_end: ingests accumulated session via ContextLedgerMCP.ctx_ingest(). Constructor accepts optional profile name. Generates unique session_id per chain run. LangChain is an optional dependency (import guarded).

queue.title: Visual editor — FastAPI backend (Phase 3 Feature 2 backend)
queue.description: Build editor server in editor/server.py using FastAPI. Endpoints: GET /api/profiles (list all), GET /api/profiles/{name} (get parsed YAML), POST /api/profiles/{name} (save via RegistryBackend), GET /api/profiles/{name}/dag (nodes+edges for visualization), GET /api/diff/{a}/{b} (section-by-section diff), POST /api/merge/{fork}/{parent} (trigger merge with tier result), GET /api/status (registry stats). CLI command: ctx editor [--port 7432] [--no-browser]. All writes go through existing ProfileParser and RegistryBackend. FastAPI is an optional dependency.

queue.title: Visual editor — single-file React UI (Phase 3 Feature 2 frontend)
queue.description: Build single index.html in editor/ui/ served by FastAPI. Uses React and Cytoscape.js loaded from CDN (no npm build step). Four tabs: Profiles (list/edit/fork/compare), DAG Editor (visual drag-and-drop with colored node types), Diff View (side-by-side section comparison with merge buttons), Context Browser (query box with three-tier memory results). All state managed via API calls to the FastAPI backend.

queue.title: VS Code extension (Phase 3 Feature 3)
queue.description: Create vscode-contextledger/ directory with package.json, tsconfig.json. Implement ctxClient.ts that shells out to ctx CLI via child_process. Implement extension.ts with activation and command registration. Commands: ContextLedger: Query, Switch Profile, Ingest Current Session, Show Status. Sidebar tree view showing active profile and recent findings. Status bar item showing active skill. Auto-routing on file open via ctx project route --file.

queue.title: GitHub Actions — skill-diff-action (Phase 3 Feature 4A)
queue.description: Create GitHub Action that runs on PRs modifying profile.yaml files. Auto-detects changed profiles, runs ctx diff on each, posts structured PR comment with section-by-section diff. Includes Tier 2 precision/recall/novelty scores if evaluation data exists. Fails the check if Tier 3 conflicts are present (blocks merge). Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY secret for Tier 2.

queue.title: GitHub Actions — skill-validate-action (Phase 3 Feature 4B)
queue.description: Create GitHub Action that validates all declared skill profiles in project.yaml exist in the registry. Takes project-manifest input pointing to .contextledger/project.yaml. Fails if any declared skill is missing.
